title: Red Apple Cookie Cutter | 3D Printed Fruit Baking Tool | 7-8cm Medium Size | PLA Food Safe Dough Cutter
description:
Bring the charm of a perfectly shaped red apple to your baking creations with our delightful Red Apple Cookie Cutter! Whether you're preparing a batch of autumn-themed cookies, crafting treats for a back-to-school celebration, or simply adding a fruity twist to your baking repertoire, this beautifully designed cookie cutter delivers crisp, clean apple shapes every single time. Designed with bakers in mind, this cutter features smooth edges and a comfortable grip that makes cutting through your favorite cookie dough an absolute breeze.

Key Features:
• Precision-designed red apple silhouette with a charming stem and leaf detail
• Sharp cutting edges for clean, defined shapes in cookie dough, fondant, clay, and more
• Lightweight yet sturdy 3D-printed construction
• Comfortable depth for easy pressing and releasing
• Versatile design works beautifully with sugar cookies, gingerbread, shortbread, and rolled fondant
• Available in a vibrant color that makes it easy to spot in your baking drawer

Dimensions:
This is our Medium (M) size cookie cutter, measuring approximately 7-8cm (2.8-3.1 inches) at its widest point. This is a wonderfully versatile size that works perfectly for standard cookies, decorated sugar cookies, and fondant toppers. The cutter depth is designed to cut through standard rolled dough thickness with ease.

How to Use:
For best results, roll your cookie dough to an even thickness of about 5-7mm on a lightly floured surface. Press the cookie cutter firmly and evenly into the dough, then gently lift and wiggle slightly to release. If the dough sticks, try dipping the cutter edge in a small amount of flour or powdered sugar before each cut. For fondant work, lightly dust the cutter with cornstarch to ensure a smooth release. You can also use this cutter with modeling clay, play dough, or craft foam for non-food creative projects.

Care Instructions:
Printed in food-safe PLA. Hand wash only – not dishwasher safe. Do not use in microwave or oven. To clean, simply rinse under lukewarm water with a mild dish soap and allow to air dry completely before storing. Avoid soaking the cutter for extended periods. Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight and heat sources to maintain the shape and integrity of the cutter for years to come.

Perfect Gift Ideas:
This red apple cookie cutter makes a wonderful and thoughtful gift for so many occasions! It is a perfect addition to a back-to-school gift basket for a favorite teacher, showing appreciation in the sweetest way possible. Pair it with a cookie recipe card and some sprinkles for a charming birthday gift for the baker in your life. It also makes a fantastic stocking stuffer during the holiday season or a fun addition to an autumn harvest gift package. Whether you're gifting to a seasoned baker or someone just starting their baking journey, this cookie cutter is sure to bring smiles and inspire delicious creativity in the kitchen.

About Our Shop:
Every cookie cutter in our shop is lovingly handmade and 3D printed to order in small batches, ensuring quality and attention to detail with each piece. We take pride in designing unique baking tools that spark joy and creativity in kitchens around the world. Because each item is printed individually, you can be confident that your cookie cutter has been crafted with care specifically for you. Thank you for supporting our small creative business — we truly appreciate every order and look forward to helping you bake something wonderful!
